what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-source image asset named p-02 in the presentation-15p set, acting as a ledger entry that points to a JPEG blob.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime, zero width/height, source, author_session, created timestamp, and empty links array.
Body line states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-02.jpg'.
The image dimensions w and h are both 0.
No descriptive caption or visual content is present.
standouts: Dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image file.
The file is a metadata stub rather than the image itself.
It explicitly labels the asset as 'design ground-truth'.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for a ledger-style asset record.
References content via blob:// URI and logical address via image:// scheme.
Includes an empty links array as a placeholder for relationships.
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is likely incorrect or unpopulated.
No descriptive caption, alt text, or visual summary is provided.
The links array is empty, leaving the asset isolated in the ledger.
notes: A minimal ledger stub that registers a single presentation image asset by identifiers and a blob pointer, but lacks descriptive or relational metadata.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0x0?
What visual content does p-02 contain?
How is this image intended to relate to other presentation-15p assets?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a source design ground-truth image ledger entry; the actual content is a metadata stub with identifiers and a blob pointer, so it catalogs the image rather than describing or displaying it.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a specific design-source image as a stable, addressable, provenance-tracked asset within a channel-memory ledger.
novelty: It separates logical asset address (image://) from physical storage (blob://), which is a distinct indirection pattern for media assets.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record that links a logical image identifier to a content-addressed blob, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking without embedding the image data.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger entry in YAML frontmatter that catalogs a design-source JPEG image named p-02 in the presentation-15p set, referencing it by logical address and content-addressed blob.
intention_for_embedding: To register a presentation image asset as ground-truth source material in a channel-memory catalog.
